name: Southern Hospitality
overview: Following the lives of a tight-knit group of friends living and working together in Charleston, S.C. At Republic, there’s never a dull shift – where a splash of shade, a pinch of drama and rumors bubbling just beneath the surface keep the party going in the electrifying VIP world.

trailers.title: Which Southern Hospitality tagline is your favorite? 👒 #bravo #shorts #southernhospitality #taglines
